narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 1-C (precinct in Huron County) has 580 registered voters, with 66.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
